description: Create a reusable GitHub Actions workflow named Build Maven Packages that can be triggered manually or called by another workflow. The workflow takes optional inputs for Ice version, Maven repository URL, and repository username. It runs on an ubuntu-24.04 environment, checks out the repository, sets up dependencies, builds the Slice compiler, updates the Ice version if provided, builds Java packages, uploads them as artifacts, and publishes to a Maven repository if repository details are provided.
